title: Remove Built by AI showcase section from /about
text: Removed the explanatory Built by AI showcase section (S7) from /about by deleting BuiltByAIShowcaseSection.tsx, dropping its import and SectionContainer block from AboutPage.tsx, and renumbering the Footer CTA comment from S8 to S7; the homepage BuiltByAIBanner was untouched, two new AC-031 Playwright tests covered section-absent and layout-continuity, 171 passed and tsc exited 0.

title: Homepage structure alignment v2
text: Closed three visual detail alignments: rectangular brick-dark diary markers (20x14px, #9C4A3B), a STEP header bar for flow cards with charcoal background and paper text in Geist Mono 10px, and body padding of 72px top and 96px right/bottom/left on desktop plus 32px/24px on mobile, with per-section padding removed to prevent double stacking; scope items A-4 and A-5 were dropped after Pencil design confirmation, Code Review rulings F1 through F7 split into five fix-now and two tech-debt, and 174 Playwright tests passed.

title: About page structure detail alignment v2
text: Aligned /about to design v2 across twelve AC items including DossierHeader bar, SectionLabelRow hairline, Hero two-line heading pairing Bodoni Moda and italic tagline, five section italic subtitles, RedactionBar, Role Card OWNS/ARTEFACT labels in Geist Mono, Newsreader italic links, CASE FILE header, LAYER 1/2/3 prefix, role annotations BEHAVIOUR and POSITION, Role Card 3x2 grid with fixed height, and shared primitives migration to the paper palette; 164 Playwright passed and one skipped, cleared on the first full-flow pass.

title: Sitewide design system baseline
text: Shipped the paper palette (paper/ink tokens) across all five routes, brought Bodoni Moda plus Newsreader plus Geist Mono online as the three-font system, migrated the NavBar to paper colors and reordered its items, and extended HomeFooterBar to /app and /business-logic; four rounds of rework covered initial design, subcomponent dark-class cleanup, architecture.md cross-table drift, and a /about text-white readability fix, landing 115 Playwright passed and one skipped and unblocking K-022/K-023/K-024.

title: Automated visual report script
text: Added visual-report.ts to auto-screenshot four routes into an HTML report, split playwright.config per-project testMatch so E2E and the report run in isolation, absorbed four Reviewer Warnings in-ticket (module-level side effect, scoped state, TICKET_ID whitelist, HTML gitignore), and cleared tsc, Vitest 36, and Playwright 45 all green.

title: Early project phases and deployment setup
text: Foundational phases: stood up FastAPI + React monorepo with JWT-protected business-logic endpoint, BrowserRouter SPA with five routes, and four base pages with a shared component library (useAsyncState, LoadingSpinner, ErrorMessage). Shipped 1H/1D forecast UI with unified UTC+0 timestamps, MA99 Pearson trend filter, early MA99 pre-compute hook for snappier UX, and per-match trend labels. Deployed backend to Cloud Run (multi-stage Docker) and frontend to Firebase Hosting via VITE_API_BASE_URL. Codex Review follow-up closed K-009 (1H predict MA history bug), K-010 (Vitest testid regression), and K-011 (LoadingSpinner label prop).
